description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named package that triggers on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow runs two jobs: conan-package and npm-package. The conan-package job uses a reusable workflow with platform_wasm set to true. The npm-package job depends on conan-package, is conditional on specific push events, and uses another reusable workflow with a package version from conan-package.
